items.summary: Fix the AdminPanel component in frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx to ensure the user identity section containing the principal ID displays correctly above the system statistics, replacing the current 'Debug Info' card that shows only principal and isOwner values

Fix the AdminPanel component in frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx to ensure system statistics (total clips count and trending clips table) render below the user identity section instead of showing only debug information

Remove or relocate the 'Debug Info' card in AdminPanel component that currently displays raw principal and isOwner boolean values, as this technical debug information should not be the primary content of the admin dashboard

Verify the useAdminStats hook in frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts is correctly fetching data from the backend and returning valid statistics without errors that would prevent the admin panel from rendering properly
